sectorSelect.title: What's your sector?
sectorSelect.subtitle: ExpertSync adapts to your reality. Choose your industry to see how we solve the problem for you.

industrial.title: Manufacturing, Distribution & Processing
industrial.description: Maintenance procedures, quality control, production protocols — your procedures already exist. We make them accessible in seconds.

financial.title: Financial Services
financial.description: Internal policies, regulatory compliance, audit procedures — your documents already exist. We make them instantly accessible.

hero.title: Your procedures exist.
hero.subtitle: Your employees search for 10 minutes in a PDF, can't find what they need, and end up calling a senior or improvising. ExpertSync turns your procedures into a chatbot: the right answer in seconds. No searching. Nothing to learn.

problem.title: This isn't a documentation problem. It's an access problem.
problem.subtitle: Your procedures are there. But nobody consults them at the right moment — and that costs you every single day.

items.title: Nobody searches your documents.
items.description: Finding the right procedure takes too long. Your employees would rather call a senior, work from memory, or improvise. Result: your documentation investment sits idle while the same mistakes keep happening.

items.title: Your experts answer the same questions all day long.
items.description: Every interruption costs 20 minutes of focus. Multiply that by 5 questions a day, 10 employees, 250 days. That's thousands of hours lost — because the information exists but isn't accessible.

solution.title: A chatbot connected to your procedures.
solution.subtitle: Your employees ask their question in plain language — like sending a text. ExpertSync answers in seconds, directly from your documents. No searching. No tool to learn. No training.
features: Ask a question in plain language, get the answer in seconds
Grounded exclusively in your internal documents and procedures
Every answer traces back to the source document, section, and page
Zero searching, zero training, zero tools to master
solution.question: "What's the torque spec for the M12 flange bolt on the PH-400 hydraulic press?"
solution.answer: "Apply 85 Nm ± 5 Nm. Use calibrated torque wrench. Star pattern tightening sequence. Verify with angle measurement per Section 4.2.3."
solution.answerSource: Source: PH-400 Technical Manual Rev.7, Section 4.2.3, p.47
solution.notDocumented: "This specification is not available in the current documentation. Please consult your engineering team."

howItWorks.title: How ExpertSync works
howItWorks.subtitle: Your procedures stay your procedures. We just make them accessible in seconds — to anyone, without searching, without training.

steps.title: We ingest your existing documents
steps.description: Your manuals, procedures, and spec sheets as they are. No rewriting needed — we work with what you already have.

steps.title: We build your internal chatbot
steps.description: In 7 to 14 days, your chatbot is live. It knows your procedures inside out and knows exactly where to look.

steps.title: Your employees ask a question
steps.description: Like texting a colleague. In seconds, the right answer with the exact source. Nothing to search, nothing to learn, nothing to change in their habits.

howItWorks.note: Step 1 is deliberately limited so you can validate results before expanding. Typical implementation: 7–14 days.

safety.title: Your technical data. Your control. Maximum security.
safety.subtitle: ExpertSync is built for industrial equipment manufacturers where intellectual property and technical confidentiality are non-negotiable.

points.title: No public AI training
points.description: Your drawings, specifications, and procedures are never used to train external models.

points.title: Private data infrastructure
points.description: Your technical documents stay within a dedicated, isolated environment.

points.title: Full document control
points.description: You decide exactly which manuals and spec sheets are indexed. Add or remove at any time.

points.title: Transparent traceability
points.description: Every answer links to the source manual, section, page, and document version.

points.title: Continuous knowledge optimization
points.description: Administrators see unanswered questions. Update procedures or add new manuals instantly.

points.title: Air-gapped deployment options
points.description: To protect your intellectual property, ExpertSync can be deployed on your private cloud or local servers.

pricing.title: Simple, predictable pricing
pricing.subtitle: Designed to start small and expand only once value is proven.
included: AI answers aligned with your specifications

items.question: Is this a replacement for our technical manuals?
items.answer: No. ExpertSync doesn't replace your manuals, it makes them accessible. Your spec sheets and procedures remain the source of truth. ExpertSync helps your technicians find the right answer in seconds, without searching.

items.question: Do employees need training to use it?
items.answer: No. It's a chatbot — your employees ask a question in plain language and get an answer. No training, no new tool to learn. If you can send a text, you can use ExpertSync.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: We don't offer open free trials. ExpertSync starts with a scoped pilot to ensure accurate results with your specific technical documents.

items.question: Who is this designed for?
items.answer: ExpertSync is built for industrial equipment manufacturers: assembly technicians, maintenance engineers, quality teams, and production managers who need fast access to exact specifications.

finalCta.title: Your procedures already exist.
finalCta.titleFaded: You just need to make them accessible.
finalCta.subtitle: A chatbot connected to your documents in 7 to 14 days. Your teams get the right answers instantly — no searching, no training, no depending on an expert.

hero.title: Your procedures exist.

problem.title: The real problem isn't documentation. It's access.
problem.subtitle: Your procedures are there. But on the floor, nobody consults them — and that costs you every shift.

items.title: Searching takes too long. So nobody searches.
items.description: On the floor, finding the right manual, the right section, the right version takes 10 to 20 minutes. Your technicians don't have that time. So they call a senior, work from memory, or improvise. Your documentation is there — but it's invisible.

items.title: Result: the same mistakes, the same calls, over and over.
items.description: Your senior experts spend their day answering the same questions. Preventable errors repeat shift after shift. And everyone has gotten used to it — because nobody knows there's a better way.

solution.title: A chatbot connected to your procedures.
solution.subtitle: Your technicians type their question in plain language. ExpertSync answers in seconds, directly from your manuals and procedures. No searching. No tool to learn. No training required.

hero.title: Your policies exist.
hero.subtitle: Your advisors and analysts call compliance or act from memory rather than open an 80-page document. ExpertSync turns your policies into a chatbot: the right regulatory answer in seconds. No searching. Nothing to learn.

problem.title: The real problem isn't documentation. It's access.
problem.subtitle: Your policies are there. But nobody reads them at the right moment — and regulatory risk quietly builds up.

items.title: Nobody reads an 80-page document to find one answer.
items.description: Finding the right policy, the right section, the right version takes too long. Your teams call compliance or act from memory. Result: rules applied approximately, outdated versions in use, and regulatory risk quietly building up.

items.title: Your compliance experts are drowning in repetitive questions.
items.description: The same questions, the same calls, all day long. Your compliance officers never have time for real high-value work. And every question that isn't answered immediately is a decision made without the right information.

solution.title: A chatbot connected to your policies and regulatory frameworks.
solution.subtitle: Your teams ask their question in plain language. ExpertSync answers in seconds, directly from your internal policies. No searching. No tool to learn. No training required.
features: Ask a question in plain language, get the answer in seconds
Grounded exclusively in your internal documents and policies
Every answer traces back to the source policy, section, and page
Zero searching, zero training, zero tools to master
solution.question: "What are the KYC requirements for a high-risk client under AML guidelines?"
solution.answer: "Enhanced identity verification required. Obtain source of funds declaration. Compliance officer approval mandatory before account opening. Periodic review every 6 months."
solution.answerSource: Source: KYC Policy v3.2, Section 5.4.1, p.23

items.question: Does this replace our compliance team?
items.answer: No. ExpertSync doesn't replace your compliance team, it frees them from repetitive questions. Your policies remain the source of truth. Your experts can focus on real high-value work.

items.question: Do teams need training to use it?
items.answer: No. It's a chatbot — your teams ask their question in plain language, like a text. No training, no new tool to learn.

items.question: Is it compliant with regulatory requirements?
items.answer: ExpertSync is built with compliance in mind: isolated data, full traceability, built-in audit trail. It can be deployed in your infrastructure to meet the strictest requirements.

items.question: Who is this designed for?
items.answer: ExpertSync is built for compliance, audit, risk management teams, and advisors in financial institutions, brokerage firms, and insurance companies.
